content: By integrating the ICM intrinsic curiosity mechanism from curiosity-driven autonomous agents into 2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems, we can create a self-sustaining memory pruning and consolidation pipeline that prioritizes storing high-uncertainty, learning-critical experiences rather than just high-reward or frequently accessed ones. This shifts active learning agent memory from a passive storage architecture to an actively curious curator that aligns memory organization with the agent’s ongoing learning goals.
